mapper.sql: template_id, template_name, face_value, threshold_amount, valid_days, cover_url, description, template_status, created_at, updated_at

activity_id, template_id, activity_name, total_stock, available_stock, locked_stock, sold_stock, per_user_limit, pay_amount, activity_status, start_at, end_at, pay_timeout_minutes, preheated_at, created_at, updated_at, version
request_id, client_request_id, user_id, activity_id, order_id, user_coupon_id, request_status, result_message, pay_required, pay_amount, expire_at, requested_at, completed_at, created_at, updated_at
order_id, order_no, request_id, user_id, activity_id, template_id, pay_amount, order_status, expire_at, paid_at, success_at, closed_at, created_at, updated_at, version
mapper.select: SELECT FROM bluenote_order.coupon_activity WHERE activity_status IN ('PREHEATED', 'ONLINE', 'SOLD_OUT', 'PAUSED') AND end_at >= #{now} ORDER BY start_at ASC, activity_id ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM bluenote_order.coupon_activity WHERE activity_id = #{activityId} FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE bluenote_order.coupon_activity SET activity_status = #{status}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, version = version + 1 WHERE activity_id = #{activityId}

UPDATE bluenote_order.coupon_activity SET activity_status = 'PREHEATED', preheated_at = #{preheatedAt}, updated_at = #{preheatedAt}, version = version + 1 WHERE activity_id = #{activityId} AND activity_status IN ('READY', 'PREHEATED', 'ONLINE')

UPDATE bluenote_order.coupon_activity SET available_stock = available_stock - 1, sold_stock = sold_stock + 1, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, version = version + 1 WHERE activity_id = #{activityId} AND available_stock > 0

UPDATE bluenote_order.coupon_activity SET available_stock = available_stock + 1, sold_stock = CASE WHEN sold_stock > 0 THEN sold_stock - 1 ELSE 0 END, activity_status = CASE WHEN activity_status = 'SOLD_OUT' THEN 'PREHEATED' ELSE activity_status END, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, version = version + 1 WHERE activity_id = #{activityId}
UPDATE bluenote_order.coupon_activity SET activity_status = 'SOLD_OUT', updated_at = #{updatedAt}, version = version + 1 WHERE activity_id = #{activityId}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM bluenote_order.coupon_seckill_request WHERE request_id = #{requestId} FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE bluenote_order.coupon_seckill_request SET request_status = #{status}, order_id = #{orderId}, user_coupon_id = #{userCouponId}, pay_required = #{payRequired}, pay_amount = #{payAmount}, expire_at = #{expireAt}, result_message = #{message}, completed_at = #{completedAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE request_id = #{requestId}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM bluenote_order.voucher_order WHERE order_id = #{orderId} FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE bluenote_order.voucher_order SET order_status = #{toStatus}, paid_at = #{paidAt}, success_at = #{successAt}, closed_at = #{closedAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, version = version + 1 WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND order_status = #{fromStatus}
mapper.select: SELECT uc.*, ct.template_name, ca.activity_name FROM bluenote_order.user_coupon uc JOIN bluenote_order.coupon_template ct ON ct.template_id = uc.template_id JOIN bluenote_order.coupon_activity ca ON ca.activity_id = uc.activity_id WHERE uc.source_order_id = #{sourceOrderId}

SELECT task_id, order_id, activity_id, user_id, expire_at, task_status, executed_at, error_message, created_at, updated_at FROM bluenote_order.order_timeout_task WHERE task_status = 'PENDING' AND expire_at <= #{now} ORDER BY expire_at ASC LIMIT #{limit}
